formulas.name: ContactInfoForEmail
formulas.expression: IF({!Email}=TRUE, "Email: " + {!EmailShare} + BR(), "")+ IF({!Phone} = TRUE, "Phone: " + {!PhoneShare} + BR(), "")+ IF({!Address} = TRUE, "Address: " + {!AddressBlock.street} + BR(), "")+ IF({!Address} = TRUE && !ISBLANK({!Address_Notes_Buzz_Unit_Access_Info}), "Additional Info: " + {!Address_Notes_Buzz_Unit_Access_Info}, "")

formulas.name: Subject
formulas.expression: "The FIMBY User, " + {!Contact.FirstName}+" "+ {!Contact.LastName}+", has shared their contact info"

fields.name: NotaMatch_0
fields.fieldText: You are attempting to share contact info with your own household.

fields.name: NotaMatch
fields.fieldText: You are not the owner of this contact, post or response so you are not able to share contact information here.

fields.name: ContactInfo
fields.fieldText: Please select which contact info you would like to share:

validationRule.errorMessage: Select at least one.
Select at least one.
Please provide an email address.
Please Provide a Phone Number.

fields.name: Address_Notes_Buzz_Unit_Access_Info
fields.fieldText: Address Notes (Buzz, Unit, Access Info, Etc.)

fields.name: ClickingNext
fields.fieldText: Clicking 'Next' will share the contact info you have provided with {!Recipient.FirstName} {!Recipient.LastName} (via email).

textTemplates.name: EmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Hey {!Recipient.FirstName},

The FIMBY User, {!Contact.FirstName} {!Contact.LastName}, has shared their contact info in relation to the response, to this post.

{!ContactInfoForEmail}

Please reach out to {!Contact.FirstName} using the contact info above to coordinate the details.

Thanks,

The Fimby Team
